channel.title: Posts on reveille.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on reveille.xyz

item.title: Slope Is More Important Than Y Intercept
item.description: Well, I already kinda knew this. But the way it is put in this post is cool.

item.title: Hello World
item.description: I have been trying to maintain a personal blog for a while now. I short list domain names, write draft posts and keep making design changes for the website. But I never get around actually publishing anything in the end. Today I have decided to end this. I won’t make any more designs or choose another domain name. I will stick to the current one and I will post whatever I write no matter how bad.
